headlines.title: Iran's Assembly of Experts names Mojtaba Khamenei supreme leader
headlines.summary: Iran's Assembly of Experts appoints 56-year-old Mojtaba Khamenei, son of slain Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as new supreme leader amid US-Israeli war. Military leaders pledge allegiance, signaling hardline continuity. This entrenches regime stability, prolonging conflict and impacting global energy markets.

framings.angle: Reports military pledges to new leader as Israel bombs Tehran
Details oil price surge alongside leadership transition announcement
Profiles new leader's background and hardliner selection process
Notes potential anger among Iranians seeking post-war change
Highlights expectation of continued hardline policies
Emphasizes confrontational path chosen during war

headlines.title: Brent crude oil prices reach $101.19 per barrel amid Iran war
headlines.summary: Iran war disrupts Middle East production and shipping, pushing Brent crude to $101.19 per barrel, up 9.2%. Global consumers face higher gasoline prices; markets await G7 response on reserves. This threatens economic growth worldwide.

framings.angle: Cites specific price of $101.19 and Chicago trading details
Predicts rising US gasoline prices without quick war end
Notes 20 percent surge threatening global energy supplies

headlines.title: Israel strikes Tehran oil depots to limit Iranian regime governance
headlines.summary: Israeli forces target Tehran infrastructure including oil facilities to weaken regime control during war. Spokesperson cites imminent weapons threat. Attacks affect Iranian civilians and leadership; escalation risks broader regional involvement.

headlines.title: Palestinians cross into northern Gaza after hostage release deal
headlines.summary: Israel permits thousands of displaced Gazans to return north following breakthrough on hostages. Families reunite amid ruins. This eases humanitarian crisis but fighting persists, impacting reconstruction efforts.

headlines.title: Rwanda-backed rebels overrun Goma displacing one million people
headlines.summary: Rebels defeat Congolese troops and enter Goma aid hub, prompting gunfire and shelling. Over one million displaced residents affected. UN warns of humanitarian disaster; aid operations now endangered.

headlines.title: NATO coordinates first response to Baltic Sea cable sabotage
headlines.summary: Alliance activates defenses after deep-sea cable severance in suspected sabotage campaign. European connectivity at risk. This tests NATO unity amid hybrid threats from Russia.

headlines.title: Hezbollah clashes with Israeli ground forces in eastern Lebanon
headlines.summary: Hezbollah fighters engage Israeli troops landed by helicopter from Syria. Iran launches first post-leadership drones at Israel. Lebanese civilians face intensified cross-border fighting; ceasefire talks stalled.

headlines.title: G7 leaders plan talks on releasing emergency oil reserves
headlines.summary: Group discusses joint reserve release as oil surges 25 percent to 2022 highs from Iran war. Consumers worldwide brace for inflation. Coordinated action could stabilize prices short-term.

headlines.title: Bahrain oil company declares force majeure on shipments post-attack
headlines.summary: State firm invokes clause after Iran attack disrupts contracts. Gulf exporters and buyers affected. This exacerbates global supply fears amid soaring prices.
